overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a bustling medieval market square, descending through narrow cobblestone alleys, and emerging onto a city wall with panoramic views of historic timber-framed architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval market square with timber stalls and central gazebo

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market square, approaching the central gazebo structure while passing food stalls on either side

notable_agents.action: villager in brown dress walking toward the market stalls
villager in green tunic walking across the square

entered.detail: wooden market stall with orange fabric roof displaying goods
eight-sided wooden pavilion with pointed roof in the center of the square
wooden push cart with wheels parked near the stalls
traditional half-timbered medieval houses with steep roofs surrounding the square

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit medieval market square with cobblestone paving. Orange-canopied market stalls line the left side while an octagonal wooden gazebo stands in the center. Timber-framed buildings surround the plaza, and villagers walk about performing daily activities.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza corner transitioning to steep cobblestone street

events.description: character turns left around the gazebo structure, changing direction from north to west
exits the open plaza and enters a steeper, narrower cobblestone street with enclosing walls

agents.ego_description: navigating around the gazebo and beginning the descent down a steep street toward a darker timber building

notable_agents.action: villager in orange tunic walking up the steep street toward the camera

entered.detail: tall medieval building with dark wooden beams and yellow window trim at the end of the street
flight of stone steps ascending along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character turns left around the central gazebo and heads toward a darker timber-framed building at the end of the plaza. The ground transitions from flat paving stones to uneven cobblestones as the street begins to slope downward, with stone stairs visible ascending to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep narrow alley between stone retaining walls

events.description: enters deep shadow cast by surrounding buildings, significantly reducing light levels
passes under wooden scaffolding and hanging laundry, entering a more enclosed alleyway

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down the steep cobblestone slope, navigating between stone walls and passing under wooden overhead structures

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near the bottom of the slope watching passersby

entered.detail: tall rough-hewn stone walls flanking both sides of the narrow street
wooden beams and planks spanning overhead between buildings
circular stone fountain with multiple tiers in the courtyard at the bottom of the slope

segments.scene_description: The character descends a steep, shadowy cobblestone street flanked by high stone walls. Wooden scaffolding and hanging laundry span overhead between timber-framed buildings. The lighting shifts to deep shadow as the character approaches a small courtyard with a stone fountain at the bottom of the hill.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with fountain leading to covered passage and stairs

events.description: enters a covered stone passage leaving the open courtyard behind
begins ascending stone stairs through a narrow walled passage

agents.ego_description: passing through the courtyard fountain area, entering a narrow passage, and climbing stone stairs toward an exit

entered.detail: confined walkway between tall stone walls with wooden doors and barred windows
steep stone steps ascending through the passage toward daylight
crenellated defensive wall with stone battlements emerging at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sunlit courtyard into a dark, narrow stone passage. After passing a villager near the fountain, the character climbs steep stone stairs between close stone walls, emerging toward bright daylight at the top where the city wall rampart becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city wall rampart with defensive battlements

events.description: emerges from dark passage into bright sunlight on the open wall rampart
view opens up to reveal panoramic cityscape with distant towers and mountains

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated city wall, passing a wooden cart loaded with barrels while taking in the expansive view of the city below

notable_agents.action: child in blue clothing running along the wall ahead

entered.detail: crenellated stone defensive wall with alternating high and low sections
wooden cart loaded with large oak barrels parked on the cobblestone rampart
panoramic view of medieval rooftops, towers, and distant mountains under a clear sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark passage onto the sunlit city wall rampart, the character walks along crenellated battlements with a wooden cart of barrels to the right. The view opens dramatically to reveal a sprawling medieval cityscape with red-tiled roofs, distant towers, and mountains on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: high vantage point on city wall overlooking clock tower and downtown

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the wall while observing the prominent clock tower and panoramic city views

entered.detail: tall stone clock tower with pointed roof and visible clock face rising above the city
distant mountain peaks visible on the horizon beyond the city walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along the elevated rampart with a prominent clock tower now visible in the center of the frame. The camera takes in sweeping views of the medieval city below, with timber-framed buildings, red rooftops, and distant mountains providing a scenic backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit medieval market square, descending through shadowy alleys before ascending to a panoramic city wall. It begins amidst orange-canopied stalls and a central wooden gazebo, moving past timber-framed buildings as the flat paving stones transition into an uneven, downward-sloping cobblestone street. The scene then shifts into deep shadow, descending a steep path flanked by high stone walls and overhead laundry before passing a small courtyard fountain and climbing a narrow stone passage. As the character emerges from the darkness into bright daylight, the camera follows them onto the crenellated battlements of the city wall past a cart of barrels. The view finally opens dramatically to reveal a sprawling cityscape of red-tiled roofs and a prominent clock tower, set against a backdrop of distant mountains.
